lesson: HTR FAIL with the log showing the lid open mid-cycle and every component reading healthy means the cycle was simply interrupted. Re-run it — no parts needed.
symptoms: Display says HTR FAIL 12 and nothing else.

tests.error-log: Heat-treat cycle aborted overnight — a hopper lid-open event logged mid-cycle. Pasteurisation incomplete.
tests.temp-probe: Mix and barrel temps in spec right now. The heater gets warm when commanded.

symptoms: Locked out at open, padlock icon alternating with HTR FAIL 12.
Night crew mention the power blinked during the storm.

tests.error-log: Heat-treat cycle aborted 3:12 am — supply interruption logged. Barrel never held pasteurisation temp.

symptoms: Machine locked out. Manager already tried a reset combo off a forum.
Display alternating HTR FAIL 12 and CALL SERVICE.

tests.error-log: Cycle aborted 1:58 am — hopper lid opened and cold mix added mid-pasteurisation. The cycle can't complete after that.

flavour: Turned it off and on again, professionally.
authenticityNote: The infamous overnight heat-treat lockout (GDD §2.2) — an interrupted pasteurisation cycle locks the machine out until a tech re-runs it. Most of the time nothing is broken, which is exactly why the machines are 'always broken'.
